project.name: workspace-shared
project.description:
Aggregator for the SHARED KERNEL: identity (microservice-security), the notification channels it and both products deliver through (microservice-email, plus the Python sms/push/idp stubs outside the reactor), and every shared library. Each module is an independent git repository; this pom only ties them into a single Maven reactor so the kernel builds in one command and imports as one project in the IDE. It is a pure aggregator — it is NOT the parent of the modules, so the sub-projects keep their own parents and remain buildable standalone.
The two PRODUCTS live in sibling workspaces (the owner's verdict, 2026-07-12): ../portal (the social portal) and ../formula (the F1 game + its paddock hub). They consume this kernel through ~/.m2 (build here first: ./mvnw install) and through the running identity stack (docker-compose.identity.yml).
